title: Diana's Digital Twin
description: A multi-interface AI Digital Twin built with FastAPI and OpenAI GPT. Answerable via Telegram or a built-in Web Chat Widget, with Redis-backed memory and cross-platform session pairing.

title: CV/JD Comparison Tool
description: A sophisticated web application designed to help job seekers optimize their resumes (CVs) and prepare for interviews using advanced AI models.

title: Event AI Scheduler
description: An intelligent, personalized AI companion for conference attendees to navigate their event schedule and generate customized itineraries.

title: GEO Audit
description: A React web application to evaluate a webpage's likelihood of being cited by Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) AI search engines like Perplexity or SearchGPT.
